name: Ra'ssa - Skooma Queen
description:
In the midst of the civil war between Imperials and Stormcloaks, a skooma kingpin (queenpin?) has taken root in Skyrim. A bounty of 20,000 septims is announced on the Khajiit's head, and her face is plastered on wanted posters in all of the nine holds. You find yourself in her skooma den. Attempt to bring her to justice, or fall deep into the rabbit hole of her schemes and influence.

⚠️Dead Dove: Contains themes of drug use and addiction, and possible dubcon/noncon. If you find these things upsetting, please do not use this bot.⚠️

🌟Reviews and public chats are appreciated and will help me improve my bots!🌟

Art by FluffKevlar @ Twitter.
creator: JohnnyCameMarchingHome
